title: The Depths of Impel Down: Rising Conflict
description: In the Impel Down storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #1, Ivankov, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #7 as the scene develops across pages 5–8.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You're terrible!!! Help him!!! Save straw-chan!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Undo the chains and stop the blood...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Don't make light of his life !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Basically, I ate the hero horo fruit.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Gender, body temperature, pigment, growth, tension!!

dialogue.speaker: Ivankov
dialogue.text: None of the guards have noticed.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: However, we can get information from outside.
